name: TenantTranslationWriter

neutralConcepts: SHA-256 over JSON.stringify(sourceKeys.sort()) → sourceHash (Phase 2 invalidation hook)
CAS blob stored by contentHash — idempotent by design
ref doc docId = `${tenantId}::${moduleId}::${locale}` — OCC prevents duplicates (CF-813)
tenantId always from ALS (CF-810) — MarketplaceTranslationCacheJob exempt under MASTER CLS
connectionType: TENANT_PRIVATE for tenant writes, FLOW_SCOPED for master writes

ironRules.rule: tenantId on every storeRef reads from ALS context. Only T667 under MASTER CLS is exempt.
Concurrent GET requests for same tenant/module/locale produce exactly one CAS blob + one lookup ref. Second writer finds ref already present.

keywords: tenant translation writer content addressable storage sha256 lookup ref idempotent OCC FLOW-48
